summary: The passing S8 benchmark uses the public sync request path and a public BodyReader API, not a benchmark-only connector or response bypass.

source_path_checks.finding: sync benchmark constructs a public sync_impl::Request, calls client.request(request), then drains response.body_mut() through BodyReader::read_all_with_buf
Client::request is public and formats the request before retry/send/redirect handling
real sync HTTP/1 request path uses RequestRefEncoder against request.part(), writes encoded bytes to the real connection, then borrows request.body_mut() for body transfer
BodyReader::read_all_with_buf is public; read_all delegates to it, and the caller-provided buffer path is available to normal users
BodyReader and related sync APIs are publicly re-exported from sync_impl
RequestRefEncoder header encoding stores HeaderValueIter and borrowed value slices instead of flattening header values into an allocated Vec
